data.body:
ROUND 9 — committed POCs + decomposed e6d9.

COMMIT 6f9a4b22 on main: 4 files (the 3 de-risk POCs + structured-output-research.md) under
docs/experiments/workflow-remediation-pocs/. The unrelated pre-existing edit to
check_registry_coverage.py (adds P8) was NOT mine -> left untouched/unstaged.

STRUCTURED-OUTPUT STRATEGY: confirmed already present in e6d9 (dedicated section + success/AC) BEFORE
decomposing (per Joe), AND given its own dedicated story S5.

DECOMPOSED e6d9 (hump-seam-spice) into 8 child stories (all check-ac + clarity pass), with build-order
depends_on links:
- S1 b44a petty-babel-rubble   — v2 declarative IR: schema, linter, v1->v2 migration        [READY ROOT]
- S2 dbc6 bake-fig-rye         — Thin interpreter + event-log run-state + replay  (dep S1)
- S3 8d8e flip-weave-tenor     — Bounded-concurrent fan-out (parallel map)        (dep S2)
- S4 7d58 stun-ash-zeal        — Provider-agnostic Pydantic AI runtime (Runner seam)         [READY ROOT]
- S5 1268 wake-thud-pip        — Structured-output reliability stack (retire 2nd-LLM) (dep S4)
- S6 d6d1 worn-mire-lath       — Drop LangChain/LangGraph + tracing via OTel->Langfuse (dep S4,S5)
- S7 00da crude-skip-swoop     — IR<->BPMN serializer + rebar moddle extension     (dep S1)
- S8 744b toxic-almond-datum   — Ephemeral bpmn-js visual editing                  (dep S7)

`ready` surfaces the two unblocked roots: S1 (IR foundation) and S4 (runtime) — two parallel tracks.
Track A: S1->S2->S3 (engine) and S1->S7->S8 (visual). Track B: S4->S5->S6 (runtime). e6d9 depends_on
chain intact; 6f2d depends_on e6d9 (remediation-on-top).

BRAINSTORM COMPLETE: architecture designed + de-risked (3/3 POCs, committed) + split into build epic e6d9
+ decomposed into 8 ready-to-claim stories. Next executable: claim S1 and/or S4.
